title: Stuck in an Elevator 电梯故障
scene: Tom和Dad乘电梯时电梯突然停住了，被困在电梯里。

lines.en: Dad, the elevator stopped! We are stuck!
lines.zh: 爸爸，电梯停了！我们被困住了！

lines.en: Stay calm. Press the alarm button.
I pressed it. Will someone come?
Yes, the building staff will get the call.
lines.zh: 会的，大楼工作人员会接到通知。

lines.en: It is dark and scary in here.
Do not worry. The lights will come back on.
What if no one comes for a long time?
lines.zh: 如果很久都没人来怎么办？

lines.en: I have my phone. Let me call for help too.
lines.zh: 我有手机。我也打电话求助。

lines.en: I hear someone outside! They are talking to us!
lines.zh: 我听到外面有声音！他们在和我们说话！

lines.en: Good, help is here. They will open the door soon.
lines.zh: 太好了，救兵来了。他们很快就会打开门。
